title: Berzan X Create Reberith
description: The official jöns jacob berzelius mod pack full of fun and (Create)ive mods
body:
# Berzan x Create Rebirth

## The mod Berzelius himself would be proud of

### Overview
Berzan x Create aims to be a simple but effective mod making the minecraft experience more towards the engineering and experimenting side making it fun and tests how creative you can be with farm creation. To create that effect we've incorporated mods such as The Create mod and Applied energetics. These two mods are the core that we based everything around.

### Essential 
One of the biggest improvements that we made to our mod apart from the core mods, is adding the Essential mod. The Essential mod allows you to play easily with friends and family, creating a simple way of getting everyone involved in minecraft without impacting the performance of the game. Essential also has many great features such as an in-game chatting system that works over different servers. They have a wardrobe feature that allows you to customize your character with different features such as wings, ears and other stuff. 

### Plasmo voice
you may have heard about Simple Voice Chat before and how it allows you to communicate with your friends, using a proximity-based in-game voice chat. Well let me introduce you to plasma voice with more customization, breaks less and is more optimized for use on big servers. The mod also works well with Essential and their world hosting enabling you to chat with you friend in game instead of having to use discord for example 


### JournyMap
The JourneyMap mod gives the player both a full screen map and a mini map that is very customizable. When playing with friends together with the essential mod a map mod helps everyone stay connected and helps you also visualize how your village expands.


### Additional mods
In addition to the core mods we have mods like:
Advanced Netherite (giving the game a longer play thru)
Better Combat (making combat more like in real life, realistic swings and stabs)
Carry On (Giving you the ability to pick up entities such as chests and mobs)
Farmer's Delight (gives the player more farmable foods , Sandwichable Mod
The Replay mod
The Traveler’s Backpack mod 

---

### Fabric VS Forge 
Choosing between having the mod for forge or fabric was one of the hardest but a comfortable W for fabric. We planned to use a forge in the beginning as it had more fun and exciting mods but forge had some issues. When we tested (multiple days of testing) the forge version had 100 to sometimes even 200, 300 fps worse performance than nearly the exact same mods on Fabric. The forge version even should have had an advantage as we tested it with 2 chunks of render distance  against the fabric version with, hear this 88 chunks of render distance. And why we ultimately ended up having the modpack on the fabric platform. 

We achieved those results by having both The Sodium and the somewhat new Nvidium mod that makes the rendering of the game butter smooth and in addition to giving you the great game play Nvidium gives you nearly unlimited render distance 

## Credits
This modpack was created by Rabona_King, together with Axantos. Help was also provided by Budget & Fille06 who made custom recipes, and again to Essential that makes it possible for the Berzan X Create Rebirth world to be played with friends.
